svg.title: Fabricated screenshot: Ceefax page 273, never broadcast
svg.desc: An invented Ceefax page 273 showing a large block-mosaic drawing of a book with a frowning face on its cover, over the caption ARE YOU READING TOO MUCH? and the line Ask yourself: is it making you happy? No such page was ever broadcast; this image is a fake, generated to show how easily documentary evidence is manufactured.

g.text: Ask yourself: is it making you happy?
